mapper.insert: insert into user_invite_tokens (invite_token_id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at, used_at) values (#{inviteTokenId}, #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}, #{usedAt})
mapper.select: select invite_token_id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at, used_at from user_invite_tokens where token_hash = #{tokenHash} limit 1
